summary: Implement hotplug NIC controller in VMI reconciler
description: Add reconciler logic to handle NIC hotplug requests. The controller should watch for annotation changes and trigger the attach/detach workflow. Must handle error cases and retry.

summary: Update networking data path for hotplug interfaces
description: Modify the networking data path to support dynamically added interfaces. Includes changes to the bridge binding and tap device management. Must handle timeout and error recovery.

summary: Add e2e tests for hotplug NIC live migration
description: Write end-to-end tests covering NIC hotplug during live migration. Test both successful hotplug and error scenarios.
